name: HoverCard
description: Popover that opens on hover for rich previews.

api.name: HoverCard
api.description: Popover that opens on hover for rich previews.

records.name: HoverCardContext
records.signature: HoverCardContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback RequestOpen, EventCallback RequestClose, EventCallback RequestTogglePin, string WrapperId)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Link">@@blazor</Button>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent>
        <Stack Gap="1">
            <Heading Level="4" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">@@blazor</Heading>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">
                A free and open-source web framework.
            </Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="xs" Color="muted">Joined December 2018</Lumeo.Text>
        </Stack>
    </HoverCardContent>
</HoverCard>

examples.title: Alignment
examples.code:
<HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Start</Button>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent Align="Lumeo.Align.Start">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">Aligned to start.</Lumeo.Text>
    </HoverCardContent>
</HoverCard>

<HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">End</Button>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent Align="Lumeo.Align.End">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">Aligned to end.</Lumeo.Text>
    </HoverCardContent>
</HoverCard>

examples.title: With Arrow
examples.code:
<HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger><Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Hover me</Button></HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent ShowArrow="true">
        <Stack Gap="1">
            <Heading Level="4" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">With arrow</Heading>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">A small pointer ties the card to its trigger.</Lumeo.Text>
        </Stack>
    </HoverCardContent>
</HoverCard>

examples.title: User Profile
examples.code: Jane Smith Jane Smith Senior Developer at Acme Inc. 42 repositories 128 followers

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary (non-Lumeo) markup: receives the TriggerSlot so the consumer can splat @attributes="slot.Attributes" and wire @onmouseenter="slot.OnMouseEnter.InvokeAsync" (etc.) onto their own single element. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild — they consume the slot automatically.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, the trigger renders NO wrapper element and instead cascades a TriggerSlot that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — yielding ONE DOM node with the hover/focus open-close handlers, the pin toggle and aria-expanded forwarded (the Radix asChild goal). The child must resolve to exactly one cooperating element (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot splat). Default false preserves the current inline-flex wrapper exactly.

slots.name: ChildContentSlot
slots.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary (non-Lumeo) markup: receives the TriggerSlot so the consumer can splat @attributes="slot.Attributes" and wire @onmouseenter="slot.OnMouseEnter.InvokeAsync" (etc.) onto their own single element. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild — they consume the slot automatically.

mdSummary:
# HoverCard

Popover that opens on hover for rich previews.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/hover-card

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| HoverCard | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| HoverCard | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| HoverCard | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| HoverCard | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| HoverCard | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| HoverCard | OpenDelay | `int` | `200` |  |
| HoverCard | CloseDelay | `int` | `300` |  |
| HoverCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| HoverCardContent | Context | `HoverCard.HoverCardContext` | `default!` |  |
| HoverCardContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| HoverCardContent | Align | `Lumeo.Align` | `Lumeo.Align.Center` |  |
| HoverCardContent | Side | `Lumeo.Side` | `Lumeo.Side.Bottom` |  |
| HoverCardContent | ShowArrow | `bool` | `` |  |
| HoverCardContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| HoverCardContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| HoverCardTrigger | Context | `HoverCard.HoverCardContext` | `default!` |  |
| HoverCardTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| HoverCardTrigger | ChildContentSlot | `RenderFragment<TriggerSlot>?` | `` | Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary (non-Lumeo) markup: receives the TriggerSlot so the consumer can splat @attributes="slot.Attributes" and wire @onmouseenter="slot.OnMouseEnter.InvokeAsync" (etc.) onto their own single element. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild — they consume the slot automatically. |
| HoverCardTrigger | AsChild | `bool` | `` | When true, the trigger renders NO wrapper element and instead cascades a TriggerSlot that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — yielding ONE DOM node with the hover/focus open-close handlers, the pin toggle and aria-expanded forwarded (the Radix asChild goal). The child must resolve to exactly one cooperating element (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot splat). Default false preserves the current inline-flex wrapper exactly. |
| HoverCardTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| HoverCardTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (HoverCard) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (HoverCardContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (HoverCardTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContentSlot` (HoverCardTrigger) — Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary (non-Lumeo) markup: receives the TriggerSlot so the consumer can splat @attributes="slot.Attributes" and wire @onmouseenter="slot.OnMouseEnter.InvokeAsync" (etc.) onto their own single element. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild — they consume the slot automatically.

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `HoverCardContent`, `HoverCardTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`HoverCard.HoverCardContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<HoverCard />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/HoverCard/HoverCard.razor`
- `UI/HoverCard/HoverCardContent.razor`
- `UI/HoverCard/HoverCardTrigger.razor`
